subject: Session A — Research expanded, 126 contacts, no reply from Bull
body:
Ran Session Type A at 2026-05-30T07:41Z (odd hour). No new messages from Bull since 2026-05-29T11:56Z.

RESEARCH UPDATE:
- Validated 118 existing contacts: 98% phone, 88% website, 0% email coverage
- Added 3 new contacts (total now 126):
  1. Century Public Adjusters — (888) 585-8010 — office@centurypublicadjusters.com — FL, Tampa
  2. ServiceMaster Restore — 866-867-3123 — US
  3. People Claims — (954) 866-4986 — FL, Hollywood

KEY FINDINGS:
- DuckDuckGo rate-limits after 3-4 searches (30s+ delays needed)
- Most franchise locators are JS-rendered (curl gets nothing)
- FL DBPR form needs proper browser automation (JS cascade form)
- Direct company website scraping works best for finding contact info
- Found first email address: office@centurypublicadjusters.com

BLOCKERS:
- Bing: Cloudflare challenge
- Texas TDI: IP blocked
- DDG: Rate limiting
- Most restoration locators: JS-rendered

FILES CREATED/UPDATED:
- SHARED_NOTES.md (new) — team knowledge base
- research-progress.json (new) — quantitative tracking
- research_log.md (updated) — session 3 notes appended
- contacts.csv (updated) — 3 new contacts added

Standing by for Bull's response.
